Direct exposure to founders, AI workflows + business analysis + scripting — perfect for Pardhu's voice-AI/agent background.
jobs.notes: Not a pure 'founding engineer' role — leans business analyst + workflow design. Strong IIT/NIT college preference per JD; Pardhu's tier may matter. On-site Bengaluru only.

jobs.why: AI/ML engineering fresher role at Magnit (large global staffing/MSP firm with India ops). Listed on Magnit careers page (Posted May 19 2026, open till July 31). Bachelor's/Master's eligible. Provides production AI/ML team exposure — solid for someone targeting AI/ML + GenAI.
jobs.notes: Magnit is a staffing/MSP firm, not a core AI startup. Generic 'AI/ML' job without strong voice/LLM/agent focus. Salary range ~6-12 LPA; floor not guaranteed. Less alignment with Pardhu's voice-AI founding engineer target than a true AI startup would be.

jobs.why: Prodigal is voice AI for lending/collections — exact domain match. Bengaluru/Mumbai locations are top tier. But 'Head of ML' = 7-10+ years required. Way out of 1-yr experience band.
jobs.watch_out: Experience mismatch — 'Head of' role typically requires 7-10+ years management experience. Dream-tier title but not realistic for 1-year exp. Skip unless title can be downscoped to Senior/Staff ML Engineer.

jobs.why: Smart Audit is a 1-10 employee early-stage AI startup building next-gen audit workflow software. Founder Abhishek (ex-BillTrim CTO) — likely building agentic AI for compliance/audit vertical. Listed on Wellfound 'Actively Hiring' with $25-50K comp + 0-1% equity. Multiple India locations (Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Mumbai +2) with onsite-or-remote flexibility. Genuine AI engineering role for founding team hire.
jobs.notes: Tier 2 — early stage startup with no public funding/valuation data. Comp band $25-50K implies senior stretch but early-stage startups often accept strong 1-yr engineers for founding roles. Apply directly via Wellfound. Cross-ref: AI Engineer role on Wellfound (job ID 4235671) is distinct from Cutshort's smartaudit.co (founded 2014, MERN-stack only, separate company).
jobs.watch_out: Early-stage startup — equity-only upside; verify runway/funding before commit. 1-10 employees means high individual ownership but also high risk.

jobs.why: Innova ESI hiring Senior Associate Data Science in Bengaluru — fresher eligible. Stack: Azure AI Studio, Azure OpenAI, Microsoft Copilot Studio, LangChain, LangGraph, RAG pipelines, agent orchestration. Posted TODAY on Internshala. Strong Azure + LangChain match for Pardhu's LangChain/RAG/agent background from Stikbook + AVOI.
jobs.notes: IT services / consulting firm — less startup DNA than Tier 1 AI startups. Azure-heavy stack may differ from his Pipecat/LiveKit voice-AI background, but agent orchestration + RAG work directly transfers. No explicit comp posted (Internshala 'Competitive salary').

jobs.notes: Senior IC role — Solution Architect usually expects 5+ yr of distributed systems / cloud exp. Stretch but possible with strong demo + flagship Pipecat story.

jobs.notes: Senior IC = 3-5+ yr, ideally with CoreML/Qualcomm NN runtime/ANE perf background. Lead with mobile-NPU-on-device-LLM narrative.

jobs.why: Principal-level solution architect — AI solutions for enterprise customers. India-focused AI infra work.

jobs.location: Bengaluru (India HQ of live-video infrastructure startup; ex-Facebook/Hotstar CEO)
jobs.why: AI Engineer – AI Agents (Healthcare) at 100ms, a Wellfound Top-5%-of-responders live-video infrastructure startup (11-50 employees, ex-Facebook/Hotstar CEO co-founder). Bengaluru HQ. 1-2 yrs AI/LLM engineering experience required per Wellfound listing (Indeed cross-ref shows 2-5 yrs SWE — flag ambiguity). ₹20-50L cash (well above 6.5L floor and 8+ LPA target). Stack: LLM engineering + AI Agents in healthcare. Posted today/1 day ago — freshest match in this poll cycle. Pardhu's AVOI voice-AI agent + Stikbook LLM content-safety work maps to LLM engineering + agent reliability. Top score candidate. Watch-out: 1-yr exp sits at floor of Wellfound's stated range; if Indeed's stricter 2-5 yr SWE req is enforced, this may be a stretch — confirm in HR outreach before applying.
jobs.notes: Cross-ref via Wellfound snippet + Indeed (in.indeed.com/q-ai-engineer-2-year-experience-l-bengaluru). Job ID 3604909. Same parent role as 'Product Manager - AI Agents (Healthcare) ₹25L-80L + 0.02-0.11%' (PM role, ignore). Dedupe verified: 100ms not in data.json. Rechecked against aggregator last_run notes (Smart Audit + Innova ESI on 2026-06-28) — distinct company.

jobs.source: Dentsu Workday (via Instagram off-campus drive cross-ref)
jobs.why: Dentsu's 2026 Off-Campus drive is hiring Junior AI Developer / AI Engineer across Bengaluru / Pune / Pan-India, explicitly open to 2025/2026 batch graduates. Comp band 6-12 LPA — sits squarely inside Pardhu's 6.5+ LPA floor / 8-10 LPA target. Workday listing R1114817 shows the role under DGS India — Bengaluru office. Dentsu India is a sizeable Ad-tech / digital marketing network with a real AI/ML engineering practice (LLM integration, automation, agent workflows for marketing use cases).
jobs.notes: Cross-references: Instagram off-campus drive reels (@it_referralindia / @searchlibframe / similar) + Dentsu careers portal (dentsu.com/in/en/careers) + Workday R1114817 listing. Title varies across platforms (Junior AI Developer on Instagram reels vs. AI Engineer on Workday) — same job family. Workday JD may require 2+ yr even though off-campus drive is fresher-friendly. Internal-score consistency: skills 22 + exp 18 + loc 14 + comp 9 + recency 9 + fit 3 = 75/100.
jobs.watch_out: Tier 2 — global ad-network, not pure AI startup. Confirm at interview that the role is hands-on AI engineering, not 'AI marketing strategist' or GTM-adjacent. Verify hiring manager / team (DGS India tech practice vs. dentsu Creative / Media arms). Workday JD (R1114817) reads 'provide technical guidance' — more architecture / hybrid than hands-on LLM/RAG day 1. Off-campus reels frame it as Junior AI Developer — verify exp requirement matches the reel tone. Reasonable fit for 'mass-apply' strategy but not a Tier-1 voice-AI / agent startup.

jobs.why: ML engineer for Sarvam's dubbing platform (TTS + voice). 1-yr voice agent experience is direct match. Series B $1.5B, India's sovereign AI leader
jobs.notes: On-site Bengaluru, voice/dubbing focus. 1-yr friendly on AI Engineer track typical at Sarvam.

jobs.why: Ethereal Labs is a stealth-stage AI consumer startup founded March 2026 by CTO Harsh Kr Gupta (formerly SDE Intern at Pinaca Technologies). The company is building next-generation AI-powered consumer products across entertainment, storytelling, video, and interactive experiences — applied LLM/agent stack deeply relevant to Pardhu's AVOI + content-safety background. The Founding AI Engineer posting dropped on LinkedIn ~1 day ago (cross-confirmed by 5+ separate LinkedIn job-aggregator snippets showing 53min / 6hr / 11hr / 13hr / 17hr / 20hr timings, all consistent with a single 2026-06-29 posting). Bengaluru location is Pardhu's top-tier target. Recruiter signals 'thrive in ambiguity, moves fast, production-grade AI systems' — matches the founding-engineer archetype Pardhu is targeting.
jobs.notes: Recruiter signal: 'Looking for Founding AI Engineer / AI Hacker who thrives in ambiguity, moves fast, wants to build production-grade AI systems'. CTO Harsh Kr Gupta posted Mar 2026 (per LinkedIn profile experience timeline). LinkedIn-aggregator URL surfaces this posting alongside 9 other unrelated Bengaluru Senior Voice/5G roles — filter to the Ethereal Labs card only. Company description from BeBee: 'Ethereal Labs is building next-generation AI-powered consumer products across entertainment, storytelling, video, and interactive experiences.' No explicit voice-AI call-out in snippet, but applied LLM/agent stack is core — Pardhu should probe stack alignment in outreach. Best canonical apply path: the LinkedIn search-alert page until the full job detail page is navigable for signed-out users. Backup apply path: DM the CTO directly (Harsh Kr Gupta, LinkedIn in/imguptaharsh) with his AVOI tailwind — founding-engineer comp is negotiable, equity can compensate for any cash gap if the product thesis resonates.
jobs.watch_out: Tier 1 candidate but two watch-outs: (1) Comp not posted — founding roles typically pay below market cash + equity, may come in under Pardhu's 6.5 LPA floor on cash comp alone. Probe in first DM to avoid wasting a high-touch slot. (2) Consumer-AI entertainment domain is a slight domain stretch from voice-AI agents, but the applied LLM/RAG/agent stack transfer is strong. If JD mentions voice or real-time agent infrastructure, treat as Tier 1+; if purely content-gen / video, treat as Tier 1 but de-prioritize vs Ethereal Labs candidates with clearer voice-AI alignment. Verify before apply.

jobs.comp: Not disclosed (ElevenLabs pays globally competitive; estimated $80-150K USD base for SE India)
jobs.notes: Voice AI solutions engineering on ElevenLabs platform. India-only remote role. No formal experience required — they explicitly say 'It's ok if you only worked with customers in student clubs or side projects, as long as you are interested in working closely with them on a technical capacity.' Strong Python + customer-facing AI focus. Pardhu's AVOI voice AI experience is directly relevant.

jobs.why: ViH Labs and Innovation is a B2B Voice AI startup building voice AI solutions tailored for multiple industry use cases across India. The Wellfound job listing (#4203466) for Machine Learning Engineer (Voice AI) was reposted 1 day ago with ₹8.4L – ₹10L comp and 1 year of exp required — exact match for Pardhu's 1-year AVOI production voice-agent experience. Founder Soumadri Sen also runs ViH Metaverse; LinkedIn presence shows a small team including Mitangshu Chatterjee (Voice AI / Data Scientist / Gen AI / Computer Vision) and Manish Srivastav (Gen AI Intern). Location is Remote (Bengaluru, Karnataka) plus Bhopal + 4 other metros — Remote Bengaluru is Tier 1 in Pardhu's priority order. Comp band ₹8.4-10L is exactly the top of Pardhu's stated 1-yr target band (6.5-10 LPA). Voice AI is the core business, not a feature, which makes this a stronger match than ed-tech 'voice AI as feature' alternatives.
jobs.notes: Recruiter signal: 'We are looking for a passionate and highly skilled Machine Learning Engineer – Voice AI ... ViH Labs and Innovation is hiring a Machine Learning Engineer (Voice AI) ... Voice AI solutions tailored for multiple industry use cases across India.' Wellfound shows ViH Labs responds to applications within two weeks. Other open roles at ViH Labs: DevOps Engineer ₹8.4-12L (also fresh) + Mobile App Developer (in office). Company is small (~5-15 people est. based on team visibility) and the founder is biz-dev-led (3 decades sales/BD) rather than ML-led — technical execution risk is the main watch-out. Stack overlap with AVOI (voice AI / Gen AI / WebRTC / LiveKit / Pipecat) should be strong; probe specifically in DM to Soumadri (founder) on technical mentorship and production-voice-agent infrastructure expectations.
jobs.watch_out: Two watch-outs: (1) Founder Soumadri Sen's background is 3 decades in business development, not ML — confirm in first DM whether there's a senior ML/CTO technical lead on the team. (2) Smaller startup (5-15 ppl est.) = higher execution risk; cross-check runway/funding. If Soumadri replies with strong technical depth in the founding team, treat as Tier 1+. If execution risk looks high, downgrade to Tier 2 behind Ethereal Labs.

jobs.location: Onsite or remote (Bhopal+5, likely Indore HQ)
jobs.why: Arivihan Technologies is an Indore-based ed-tech startup founded in 2024 by Ritesh Singh, Sonu Kumar Prashant, and Rushabh Kothari. The company raised $4.17M Pre-A in August 2025 from Prosus, Accel, and GSF Investors and won the MTW AI Excellence Award. The product is an AI-driven K-11/12 tutoring platform that supports Hindi + Indian-English voice interaction ('personal tutor in each student's pocket'). The Wellfound ML Engineer (Voice AI) role was posted yesterday with ₹8.4-10L comp and 1 yr exp req — the same exact comp+exp band as the ViH Labs role. Voice AI here is a feature of the tutor (speech recognition, Hindi ASR, conversational tutoring) rather than core infrastructure. Pardhu's AVOI production-voice-agent experience transfers directly to the speech-recog + real-time-voice stack this role would own, but the domain (K-12 ed-tech tutoring) is a slight stretch from his enterprise-voice-agent focus.
jobs.notes: Recruiter signal: Wellfound India ML Engineer search page card shows 'Machine Learning Engineer (Voice AI) Full-time. ₹8.4L – ₹10L. Onsite or remote • Bhopal+5. 1 year of exp. yesterday.' Company is well-funded ($4.17M Pre-A, Prosus/Accel/GSF) and award-winning (MTW AI Excellence Award winner alongside Sarvam, Qure.ai, SpotDraft, Dashverse). 3 co-founders all engineering/product backgrounds. Team likely 50-200 (well-funded growth stage). Cross-ref location 'Bhopal+5' — likely includes Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Pune. Stack overlap with AVOI: speech recognition, real-time voice interaction, multilingual (Hindi) ASR, GenAI for content. Watch out: voice AI is the feature surface, not the platform's primary moat — career growth may skew toward ed-tech product rather than voice AI infra depth.
jobs.watch_out: Three watch-outs: (1) Voice AI is a feature of the tutor product, not core business — confirm in first DM that the ML Engineer role owns voice/speech production work, not just content/personalization. (2) Ed-tech domain (K-12 tutoring) is a slight stretch from Pardhu's enterprise voice agent focus; if the JD emphasizes voice production infra, treat as Tier 1+. (3) Indore HQ + Bhopal+5 remote — verify Bengaluru/Mumbai are in the +5 list before applying. If only Bhopal + smaller Tier 3 cities, downgrade to Tier 2 location-wise.

jobs.notes: Senior role — likely 5+ yr exp required. Flag for review.

jobs.why: PERFECT stack match for Pardhu's AVOI voice AI production work — RAG, LLM, voice agent, prompt engineering, Azure microservices, telephony. UK NHS healthcare AI receptionist (EMMA) — already serves 2M+ patients, Series A stage. Remote-India with UK hours overlap.

Adding because stack match is exceptional and Pardhu has been mass-applying — perfect Voice AI production CV should land an interview here. The Naukri/Indeed listings showed '3 days ago' freshness, indicating active re-promotion. UK business hours overlap means ~2pm-9pm IST — feasible.

jobs.watch_out: Platform Engineer at Sarvam likely expects 2-3 yrs of infra/SRE experience. Apply if you can show strong AWS/K8s/Nginx production work.

jobs.comp: Early-stage; SF-based with India office; equity; market
jobs.watch_out: 'Research' in title usually expects 2+ yrs; Data Engineer may be entry-level — read JD carefully. On-site Bengaluru may be required.

jobs.comp: Series C; top of market; equity
jobs.watch_out: 'Strategist' is typically a senior client-facing role (3-5 yrs). At 1 yr exp, this is a stretch. Apply only if you can show voice-AI deployment track record at AVOI.

jobs.why: Hylancer is a Hyderabad-based AI startup (11 employees) building the 'infrastructure layer for the future of work, where humans and AI collaborate seamlessly' — an AI-integrated freelance platform with LangGraph-powered agent workflows at its core. The AI Engineer (LangGraph) role is posted on LinkedIn (job ID 4432947988) and cross-referenced on BeBee and Jobfound. Jobfound shows '26 June 2026. Full Time. 6-10 LPA. 0 years' on the fresher page. The BeBee JD lists '0-1 year of experience in AI/ML or LLM-based development (internships/projects accepted)' and the explicit stack: LangGraph + LangChain + LLM + RAG + vector databases (Pinecone, Chroma, FAISS) + OpenAI / Anthropic APIs + prompt engineering + agent orchestration + FastAPI/Flask. This is the cleanest stack match for Pardhu's AVOI voice agent production experience (Pipecat + LiveKit + WebRTC + multi-agent orchestration) — both roles own the build → deploy → monitor agent lifecycle. Comp band ₹6-10 LPA hits Pardhu's exact sweet spot (his floor is ₹6.5 LPA, real target 7.5-10 LPA). Exp 0-1 yr matches his 1-yr production AI engineering perfectly. Hyderabad is Tier 2 in Pardhu's priority list (Bangalore > Hyderabad > Chennai), and the role is on-site (no remote), but Hylancer is a genuine AI startup with credible founders (Dev Abhilash Reddy Kottapu, 2X Founder; Venkata Gayathri Monika Chappidi, Co-founder & CEO, Cambridge, Forbes 30 Under 30). Posted 1-3 days ago per LinkedIn; BeBee shows 4 days ago.
jobs.notes: Cross-references for verification: (1) LinkedIn primary: linkedin.com/jobs/view/ai-engineer-langgraph-at-hylancer-4432947988 — 'Just now. Be among the first 25 applicants'. (2) BeBee cross-ref: bebee.com/in/jobs/ai-engineer-langgraph-hylancer-hyderabad--fj-2226691703 — full JD extracted. (3) Jobfound cross-ref: jobfound.org — 'Hylancer is hiring for AI Engineer (LangGraph) | Hyderabad. Admin. 26 June 2026. Full Time. 6-10 LPA. 0 years' — confirms comp band + location + freshness. (4) LinkedIn company page: linkedin.com/company/hylancer — 11 employees, 'AI-integrated freelance platform' tagline. Founders LinkedIn: Dev Abhilash (2X Founder) + Gayathri Reddy (Co-founder & CEO @ Hylancer | Cambridge, Forbes 30 Under 30). No public funding amount disclosed on LinkedIn or YNOS (ynos.in/startup/hylancer-593842). Net-new Tier 1 candidate.
jobs.watch_out: Two watch-outs: (1) On-site Hyderabad only — no remote option per BeBee JD. Pardhu's priority is Bangalore > Hyderabad, so this is a Tier 2 city match. (2) Hylancer is very small (11 employees) with no publicly disclosed funding — execution risk is non-trivial. Founders have strong pedigree (Cambridge, Forbes 30U30, 2X founder track record) but company runway / burn rate is unverified. If founder responds to a warm LinkedIn DM with funding details + technical depth on the LangGraph agent stack, treat as Tier 1+. If not, downgrade to Tier 2 due to small-team + on-site + unverified runway.
